title: Runko MCP catalog - shared definitions
description: Shared types referenced by catalog.json (design.md §8.2, §8.3). One schema source feeds platform API types, runko-ci, and the generated MCP server per the codegen rule in §28.2 item 2 - do not hand-duplicate these shapes elsewhere.

Error.description: Canonical structured error, reconciling §6.5's UI error shape with §8.3's agent error contract. Every tool call failure uses this shape; agents should branch on `code`, not parse `message`.

field.description: Optional: dotted path of the offending input field (e.g. 'intent.owners').

suggestion.description: Optional: actionable fix, e.g. 'did you mean 'checkout-api'?' or 'add owners: [group:x]'.

doc_url.description: Optional: deep link to relevant docs section.

retryable.description: Whether retrying the same call (unmodified) could succeed - e.g. true for transient backend errors, false for validation failures.

Actor.description: Principal reference (§7.5). Changes and workspaces always record who performed writes.

Capability.description: §7.2 opt-in L2 capabilities. 'build' declares a build-graph binding (§14.5.4).

id.description: Canonical control-plane project ID (§10.2) - not written in the tree.

owners_summary.description: Effective owners, summarized (not full coverage detail - see who_owns for that).

ProjectSummary.description: Compact orientation shape used by list_projects and embedded elsewhere. Context-budget rule (§8.2): default responses are summaries + stable IDs.

ProjectDetail.description: Full effective view returned by get_project(detail=full).

run_everything.description: CI templates and callers MUST honor this flag - fail closed to a broader run, never fail open to 'run nothing' (§13.3, §14.5.3).

AffectedComputation.description: §14.4.1 affected block, reused wherever affected computation is exposed.

source.description: Where the effective owners resolution came from (§7.3).

id.description: Stable Change-Id; survives rebases and amends (§7.4).

ChangeComment.description: Review-conversation comment (design.md §13.4.1, decided 2026-07-10). Anchor: change-level (no path), file-level (path only), or line-level (path+side+line); always bound to the head_sha it was written against - comments on older heads render as outdated, never floated (floating is v1.x). Threads are one level deep via parent_id; resolved lives on the root comment.

head_sha.description: The Change head version this comment was written against (§13.4.1); differs from the current head when the comment is outdated.

parent_id.description: Root comment of the thread when this is a reply.

resolved.description: Root comments only; settable by the thread author, the Change author, or an owner of the anchored path.

details_urls.description: Check name -> deep link to the CI run that reported it (report-check's details_url). Names absent here have no reported link.

checks.description: Check-set policies (e.g. 'unit:* over affected') are pre-expanded into concrete names here (§14.4.2).

blockers.description: Plain-language blockers per §6.6, e.g. 'workspace is 12 commits behind trunk'.

MergeRequirements.description: Same structure surfaced to humans (Change page) and agents (get_merge_requirements) - §8.3, §13.4.

language.description: Optional; absent -> the default (Go) template set. Recorded verbatim in PROJECT.yaml, never default-filled. Unsupported values require no_template (§10.4).

path.description: Optional; auto-derived from name/org convention if omitted.

owners.description: Optional; defaults to creator's primary group (§6.3).

no_template.description: Escape hatch (§10.4): skip template scaffolding - PROJECT.yaml + README only, language recorded as-is. Mutually exclusive with template_id.

build_engine.description: Optional; absent -> the language default (ts -> vite, else bazel; §14.5.5). bazel emits BUILD.bazel + the capability_config.build binding; vite emits a generated package.json + vite.config.ts with NO build capability (territory scaffold, not an engine); none scaffolds nothing. vite/none plus an explicit 'build' capability is a structured invalid_combination error.

CreateProjectIntent.description: L0-only intent (§10.1, §8.5) - the only shape agents or the create wizard ever need to produce.

PageParams.description: §17.4 pagination / compact-list defaults for token efficiency.
